message:
🌱 security: pin actions/github-script to SHA in ai-attribution.yml (#9983)

Pins the unpinned action dependency to a full commit SHA to satisfy
Scorecard PinnedDependenciesID rule (CodeQL alert #647).

  uses: actions/github-script@v7
 uses: actions/github-script@f28e40c...5673b # v7

Supply-chain hygiene: SHA-pinned actions cannot be silently mutated
by a tag force-push.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Check for AI authorship signals
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        uses: actions/github-script@f28e40c7f34bde8b3046d885e986cb6290c5673b # v7
         with:
           script: |
             const PR_AUTHOR_TYPE_BOT = 'Bot';
